meaning: a. 全部的, 全体的, 从头至尾的, 一切在内的\nadv. 从头到尾, 总的说来\nn. 罩衫, 工作服
example: - Overall, the study's findings challenge the traditional assumptions about cognitive development.

meaning: vt. 战胜, 克服, 胜过\nvi. 得胜
example: - She overcame her fear of public speaking through persistent practice.

meaning: n. 溢值, 超值, 泛滥\nv. (使)泛滥, (使)溢出, (使)充溢\n[计] 上溢; 溢出
example: - The heavy rain caused the river to overflow its banks, flooding nearby villages.

meaning: vt. 分解检查, 翻修, 精细检查, 彻底革新\nn. 分解检查, 精细检查, 大检修
example: - The aging power plant underwent a complete overhaul to meet new environmental standards.

meaning:
n. 经常开支, 普通用费, 天花板
a. 在头上的, 高架的
adv. 在头顶上, 在空中, 在高处, 从头到脚全部没入地
[计] 总开销; 额外开销
example: - Reducing overhead is essential for improving profit margins in competitive markets.

root: over(超过)+hear(听)→听到不该听的→偷听
meaning: vt. 无意中听到, 偷听
example: - She overheard her colleagues discussing the upcoming merger in the break room.

root: over(在...上)+lap(重叠)→部分重叠→重叠
meaning:
n. 重叠, 重复, 部分的同时发生
vt. 重叠, 重复, 与...同时发生
vi. 迭盖, 部分的同时发生
[计] 重叠
example: - There is a significant overlap between the responsibilities of the two departments.

root: over(超过)+look(看)→从上面看→忽视；俯瞰
meaning: vt. 俯瞰, 远眺, 没注意到\nn. 眺望, 俯瞰到的景色
example: - The hotel room overlooks the Mediterranean Sea, offering breathtaking views at sunrise.

meaning: n. 爆发, 暴动\n[医] 暴发
example: - The government imposed strict quarantine measures following the outbreak of avian flu in the region.

meaning: n. 结果, 出口
example: - The outcome of the clinical trial was highly encouraging, showing significant improvement in patient recovery rates.

meaning: n. 用具, 配备, 机构\nvt. 配备, 供应\nvi. 得到装备
example: - The research team brought a sophisticated scientific outfit to study the remote glacier.

meaning: n. 郊游, 远足\na. 远足适用的
example: - The school organized an outing to the national park to enhance students' understanding of ecology.

meaning: n. 出口, 发泄方法, 市场\n[医] 出口
example: - Regular exercise serves as a healthy outlet for stress and anxiety.

meaning:
n. 大纲, 轮廓, 概要
vt. 描画轮廓, 描述要点
n. 大纲, 分级, 轮廓
[计] 大纲, 分级, 轮廓
example: - The professor asked students to submit a detailed outline before writing the final essay.

meaning: n. 观点, 景色, 前途, 了望\n[经] 展望
example: - Her optimistic outlook on economic recovery influenced the team's strategic planning.

meaning: n. 输出, 产品, 产量\n[计] 输出
example: - The factory's annual output increased by 12% after the introduction of automated machinery.

meaning: n. 热心, 热衷, 热诚
example: - Her zeal for environmental conservation inspired the entire team to adopt sustainable practices.

meaning: n. 知识, 学问, 认识, 知道
example: - Her profound knowledge of classical literature impressed the examiners.

meaning: n. 辩论, 讨论\nv. 争论, 辩论
example: - The candidates engaged in a heated debate on climate policy ahead of the election.

meaning:
a. 懒惰的, 闲散的, 停顿的, 空闲的, 无用的
vi. 无所事事, 闲散, 浪费, 空转
vt. 虚度, 使闲散, 使空转
n. 空转, 空闲时间
[计] 空闲时间
example: - He spent the summer idling away his time instead of preparing for the graduate entrance exam.

meaning: n. 态度, 看法, 姿势\n[医] 体态, 姿势, 态度
example: - Her positive attitude toward challenges contributed significantly to the team's success.

meaning: n. 随员, 套房, (一)组, (一)套, 组曲, 继之而来的事\n[电] 程序组
example: - The CEO arrived with a suite of senior advisors and legal counsel.

root: wrink(弯曲)+le(反复)→反复弯曲→皱纹
meaning: n. 皱纹, 妙计, 方法, 技巧\nvi. 起皱\nvt. 使起皱纹
example: - Her forehead bore deep wrinkles from years of intense concentration.

meaning: n. 机械人, 自动机械, 机械般工作的人\n[计] 机器人; 自动机
example: - Modern industrial robots can assemble cars with remarkable precision and speed.

root: brief(短)+case(箱子)→装文件的箱子→公文包
meaning: n. 公事包
example: - She placed her laptop and presentation slides into the briefcase before heading to the board meeting.

meaning:
n. 孤儿
a. 无双亲的, 孤儿的
vt. 使成孤儿
[计] 弧体
example: - The charity provides education and shelter for orphans in war-torn regions.

meaning:
n. 音调, 音质, 语调, 语气, 色调, 气氛, 状况, 思想状态
vt. 给...定色调, 增强, 使...的声调和谐, 定音调
vi. 颜色调和
[计] 双音频
example: - The speaker's calm tone helped ease the tension in the room.

meaning: n. 摇动, 震动\nvt. 摇动, 动摇, 使震动, 挥舞\nvi. 震动, 发抖, 动摇
example: - The earthquake made the windows shake violently.

root: a(加强)+band(带子)+on→带子被丢弃→抛弃
meaning: 抛弃，遗弃；放弃
example: - Those who abandon hope will never achieve their goals.

meaning: n. 无知, 愚味\n[法] 无知, 不知情, 愚昧
example: - His refusal to acknowledge climate change stems from sheer ignorance rather than deliberate denial.

meaning: n. 动词\n[计] 动词
example: - In the sentence 'She writes novels', 'writes' is the main verb.

meaning: n. 恶意, 怨恨, 使人烦恼的事物\nvt. 故意刁难, 欺侮
example: - She married him out of spite, not love.

root: sin(一起)+cere(生长)→一起生长→真诚的
meaning: a. 诚实的, 正直的, 真挚的, 纯净的
example: - Her sincere apology helped rebuild the trust between the two departments.

meaning: n. 干旱, 缺乏
example: - The region has been suffering from a severe drought for over two years, causing widespread crop failure.

meaning:
n. 焦点, 焦距
vi. 聚焦, 注视
vt. 使聚焦, 调焦, 集中
[计] 焦点
example: - The conference focused on sustainable development as the key priority.

meaning: n. 灯笼, 提灯, 航标灯\nvt. 装上提灯
example: - During the Mid-Autumn Festival, children carry colorful lanterns while walking through the streets.

root: like(相似)+lihood(状态)→相似的状态→可能性
meaning: n. 可能, 可能性
example: - There is a high likelihood that the policy will be revised in the next quarter.

meaning: n. 水沟, 细长孔, 硬币投币口, 缝, 狭槽, 狭通道, 位置, 一档(广播节目等)\nvt. 开槽于, 把...纳入机构\n[计] 槽; 存储槽
example: - The technician inserted the memory card into the slot on the laptop's side.

meaning: n. 宽度, 宽广, 广博\n[医] 宽度
example: - The width of the river varies from 20 to 50 meters depending on the season.

meaning: v. 安排, 排列, 达成协议\n[计] 重排
example: - The committee arranged a series of lectures on climate change for graduate students.

root: e(出)+loqu(说)+ent(形容词)→说出的→雄辩的
meaning: a. 雄辩的, 有口才的, 有说服力的
example: - Her eloquent speech convinced the committee to approve the funding.

meaning: n. 教条, 学说\n[医] 学说
example: - The Monroe Doctrine declared that the United States would oppose European colonialism in the Americas.

meaning: vt. 铺设, 安排, 铺满, 为...铺路\n[化] 铺设
example: - The city council plans to pave the old cobblestone streets with eco-friendly asphalt.

meaning:
n. 形状, 形态, 外形, 形式, 身材
vt. 定形, 使成形, 塑造, 计划, 使符合
vi. 成形, 形成, 成长
[计] 形状
example: - The future of the industry is being shaped by rapid technological advances.

meaning:
n. 规则, 统治, 控制, 支配, 规律, 标准, 章程, 破折号, 铅线
vt. 规定, 统治, 管理, 控制, 支配, 裁决
vi. 统治, 管辖, 裁定
[计] 规则, 水线
example: - The university has strict rules regarding academic integrity, and violations may result in expulsion.

meaning: vt. 传达, 运输, 转让\n[经] 转让(财产等), 搬运
example: - The author's tone effectively conveys a sense of urgency and moral responsibility.

meaning: vt. 使位于, 使处于
example: - The university is situated in the heart of the historic city.

root: war(战争)+fare(进行)→进行战争→战争
meaning: n. 战争, 战斗, 交战, 斗争, 竞争\n[法] 战事, 作战, 交战
example: - Cyber warfare has become a critical component of modern national security strategy.

meaning: pron. 她自己, 她亲自
example: - She taught herself advanced calculus during the summer break.

root: branc(爪子)+h→像爪子一样分叉→树枝
meaning:
n. 树枝, 支店, 支流, 分部
vi. 分支, 出枝
vt. 分割, 用枝状叶脉刺绣花纹装饰
[计] 分支, 目录分支
example: - The company opened a new branch in Shanghai to expand its market presence.
